properties.displayName: System Time and Timezone Discovery Commands
properties.description: Detects commands used to discover system time, timezone, and date information
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\time.exe" or Image|endswith has "\date.exe" or Image|endswith has "\tzutil.exe" or Image|endswith has "\w32tm.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "time /t" or CommandLine|contains has "date /t" or CommandLine|contains has "tzutil /g" or CommandLine|contains has "tzutil /l" or CommandLine|contains has "w32tm /query" or CommandLine|contains has "w32tm /stripchart") and Image endswith "\net.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "net time" or CommandLine|contains has "net view") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-Date" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-TimeZone" or CommandLine|contains has "[DateTime]::Now" or CommandLine|contains has "[DateTime]::UtcNow" or CommandLine|contains has "[TimeZone]::CurrentTimeZone" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject Win32_TimeZone" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-WmiObject Win32_LocalTime" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-CimInstance Win32_TimeZone") and Image endswith "\wmic.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "wmic timezone" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic os get localdatetime" or CommandLine|contains has "wmic os get lastbootuptime")
